sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82868" key="phganhra/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πηγαν-ηρά</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n82868.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rueplaster</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:7:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.17</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:5:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.4</biblScope></bibl>. :—also <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πηγαν-ηρόν</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg015:40" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.40</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
